XL.requires_addon: Requires a separate LibXL license ($219 per platform, or $1,199 Enterprise) on top of the base MBS plugin.

functions.name: XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat
functions.description: Adds a new conditional format to the workbook for using with conditional formatting rules. Requires LibXL 4.1 or newer and only for xlsx files.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

functions.result: Returns conditional format index number or error.

examples.label: Highlighting cells that begin With the given text:
examples.text_code:
# add conditional format
Set Variable [
$cFormat
; Value:
MBS
("XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat";
$book
) ]
#
# set font to be folder
Set Variable [
$font
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormat.Font
";
$book
;
$cFormat
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Font.SetBold
";
$book
;
$font
; 1) ]
#
Set Variable [
$
CF
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Sheet.AddConditionalFormatting
";
$book
;
$sheet
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange
";
$book
;
$
CF
; 2; 10; 1; 1) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRule
";
$book
;
$
CF
; 0 /* BeginWith */;
$cFormat
; "a") ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> add conditional format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat"; $book) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cFormat</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> set font to be folder</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormat.Font"; $book; $cFormat) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$font</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Font.SetBold"; $book; $font; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Sheet.addConditionalFormatting"; $book; $sheet) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cf</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange"; $book; $cf; 2; 10; 1; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRule"; $book; $cf; 0 /* BeginWith */; $cFormat; "a") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Highlight cells based on other cell with formula:
examples.text_code:
# Make date format
Set Variable [
$dateFormat
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddFormat
";
$Book
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetNumFormat
";
$Book
;
$dateFormat
; 14) ]
#
# write two dates
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Sheet.CellWriteDate
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 3; 3; Date ( 3 ; 4 ; 2020 );
$dateFormat
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Sheet.CellWriteDate
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 3; 4; Date ( 4 ; 5 ; 2021 );
$dateFormat
) ]
#
# add conditional format
Set Variable [
$cFormat
; Value:
MBS
("XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat";
$book
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormat.SetFillPattern
";
$book
;
$cFormat
; 1 /* solid */) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormat.SetPatternBackgroundColor
";
$book
;
$cFormat
;
MBS
("
XL.Color.Pack
";
$book
; 240; 240; 240)) ]
#
# define formula to change background if second one is bigger
Set Variable [
$
CF
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Sheet.AddConditionalFormatting
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 2; 20; 4; 4) ]
# newer LibXL
5.1
needs range in AddConditionalFormatting call and older LibXL needs AddRange call
// Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange
";
$book
;
$
CF
; 2; 20; 4; 4) ]
# the 3 is relative to the first row of the range
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRule
";
$book
;
$
CF
; 6 /* Expression */;
$cFormat
; "=
$E3
>
$D3
") ]

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Make date format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddFormat"; $Book ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$dateFormat</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Format.SetNumFormat"; $Book; $dateFormat; 14) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> write two dates</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Sheet.CellWriteDate"; $book; $sheet; 3; 3; Date ( 3 ; 4 ; 2020 ); $dateFormat) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Sheet.CellWriteDate"; $book; $sheet; 3; 4; Date ( 4 ; 5 ; 2021 ); $dateFormat) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> add conditional format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat"; $book) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cFormat</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormat.SetFillPattern"; $book; $cFormat; 1 /* solid */) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormat.SetPatternBackgroundColor"; $book; $cFormat; MBS("XL.Color.Pack"; $book; 240; 240; 240)) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> define formula to change background if second one is bigger</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Sheet.addConditionalFormatting"; $book; $sheet; 2; 20; 4; 4) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cf</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> newer LibXL 5.1 needs range in AddConditionalFormatting call and older LibXL needs AddRange call</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="False" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange"; $book; $cf; 2; 20; 4; 4) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> the 3 is relative to the first row of the range</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRule"; $book; $cf; 6 /* Expression */; $cFormat; "=$E3>$D3") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Book.AddCustomNumFormat
functions.description: Adds a new custom number format to the workbook. The format string customNumFormat indicates how to format and render the numeric value of a cell. Returns the custom format identifier. It's used in XL.Format.SetNumFormat . Read website for details: http://www.libxl.com/custom-format.html

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The format string.

examples.label: Create Excel file with some date value:
examples.text_code:
#create new xls file
Set Variable [
$book
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.NewBook
"; 0 )]
#create date format
Set Variable [
$dateFormat
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddFormat
";
$book
)]
Set Variable [
$dateFormatID
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Book.AddCustomNumFormat";
$book
; "mmmm\ d\,\ yyyy")]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetNumFormat
";
$book
;
$dateFormat
;
$dateFormatID
)]
#create sheet
Set Variable [
$sheet
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddSheet
";
$book
; "Sales Receipt")]
#Write date
Set Variable [
$d
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Date.Pack
";
$book
; 2013; 10; 21)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.CellWriteNumber
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 4; 4;
$d
;
$dateFormat
)]
#
Set Field [
Writing data::Output
;
MBS
("
XL.Book.Save
";
$book
; "test.xls")]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Book.Release
";
$book
)]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>create new xls file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.NewBook"; 0 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$book</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>create date format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddFormat"; $book)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$dateFormat</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddCustomNumFormat"; $book; "mmmm\ d\,\ yyyy")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$dateFormatID</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Format.SetNumFormat"; $book; $dateFormat; $dateFormatID)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>create sheet</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddSheet"; $book; "Sales Receipt")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sheet</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Write date</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Date.Pack"; $book; 2013; 10; 21)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$d</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.CellWriteNumber"; $book; $sheet; 4; 4; $d; $dateFormat)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.Save"; $book; "test.xls")</Calculation>
    <Field table="Writing data" id="99999" name="Output"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.Release"; $book)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Add a custom format with condition:
examples.text_code:
# define custom number format
#
Set Variable [
$customFormat
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Book.AddCustomNumFormat";
$book
; "[Red]#[<=100];[Blue]#[>100]") ]
#
# make format
#
Set Variable [
$textFormat
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddFormat
";
$book
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetNumFormat
";
$book
;
$textFormat
;
$customFormat
) ]
#
# add sheet and use format:
#
Set Variable [
$sheet
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddSheet
";
$book
; "") ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.CellWriteNumber
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 8; 1; 90;
$textFormat
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.CellWriteNumber
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 8; 1; 110;
$textFormat
) ]

functions.name: XL.Book.AddFont
functions.description: Adds a new font to the workbook, initial parameters can be copied from other font.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: initFont
parameters.description: The index of an existing font which you want to use as a template.

functions.result: Returns new font index or error.

examples.label: Create a font:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$textFont
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Book.AddFont";
$book
)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Font.SetSize
";
$book
;
$textfont
; 8)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Font.SetName
";
$book
;
$textfont
; "Century Gothic")]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddFont"; $book)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$textFont</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Font.SetSize"; $book; $textfont; 8)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Font.SetName"; $book; $textfont; "Century Gothic")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Book.AddFontFromBook
functions.description: Copies a font definition. Takes an existing font definition in one document and creates a new font in destination document by copying the properties.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference to the destination workbook.

parameters.name: otherBookRef
parameters.description: The reference to the source workbook.

parameters.name: Font
parameters.description: The index of an existing font from the source book which you want to use as a template.

functions.result: Returns new font index or error.

functions.name: XL.Book.AddFormat
functions.description: Adds a new format to the workbook, initial parameters can be copied from other format.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: initFormat
parameters.description: The index of an existing format which you want to use as a template.

functions.result: Returns index of new format or error.

examples.label: Writes sheet with red font:
examples.text_code:
#create new xls file
Set Variable [
$book
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.NewBook
"; 0 )]
#create fonts
Set Variable [
$redColor
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Color.Pack
";
$book
; 255; 0; 0)]
Set Variable [
$redFont
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddFont
";

examples.label: Apply a new format to a column:
examples.text_code:
#create new format
Set Variable [
$format
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Book.AddFormat";
$BookRef
)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetNumFormat
";
$BookRef
;
$format
; 7)]
#set as format for column
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.SetColumn
";
$BookRef
; 0; 6; 6; 50 ;
$format
; 0 )]
#loop over all rows
Set Variable [
$lastRow
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.GetLastRow
";
$BookRef
;
$sheet
)]
Set Variable [
$row
; Value:1]
Loop
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.SetCellFormat
";
$BookRef
;
$sheet
;
$row
; 6;
$format
)]
#next
Set Variable [
$row
; Value:
$row
+ 1]
Exit Loop If [
$row
>
$lastRow
]
End Loop
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>create new format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddFormat"; $BookRef )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$format</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Format.SetNumFormat"; $BookRef; $format; 7)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>set as format for column</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetColumn"; $BookRef; 0; 6; 6; 50 ; $format; 0 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>loop over all rows</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.GetLastRow"; $BookRef; $sheet )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$lastRow</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$row</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetCellFormat"; $BookRef; $sheet; $row; 6; $format )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>next</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$row + 1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$row</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$row > $lastRow</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Book.AddFormatFromBook
functions.description: Copies a format definition. Takes an existing format definition in one document and creates a new format in destination document by copying the properties.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference to the destination workbook.

parameters.name: otherBookRef
parameters.description: The reference to the source workbook.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The index of an existing format in the source book which you want to use as a template.

functions.result: Returns index of new format or error.

functions.name: XL.Book.AddPictureContainer
functions.description: Adds a picture to the workbook from container. Returns a picture identifier. Supports BMP, DIB, PNG, JPG and WMF picture formats. Use picture identifier with XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithScale or XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithSize functions. For XLSX files you can embed SVG graphics with LibXL 4.2 or newer.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description: The container value with the image inside.

";

;
$sheet
; 2; 1;
$logoID
; .2)]

examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$image
; Value:
MBS
( "
GMImage.NewFromContainer
";
Writing data::Logo
) ]
If [
MBS
("IsError") = 0 ]
Set Variable [
$destWidth
; Value: 120 ]
Set Variable [
$destHeight
; Value: 120 ]
Set Variable [
$width
; Value:
MBS
( "
GMImage.GetWidth
";
$image
) ]
Set Variable [
$height
; Value:
MBS
( "
GMImage.GetHeight
";
$image
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
GMImage.Release
";
$image
) ]
Set Variable [
$factor
; Value: Min (
$destheight
/
$height
;
$destwidth
/
$width
) ]
Set Variable [
$dwidth
; Value:
$width
*
$factor
]
Set Variable [
$dheight
; Value:
$height
*
$factor
]

; Value:

( "XL.Book.AddPictureContainer";
$book
;
Writing data::Logo
) ]
If [
MBS
("IsError") = 0 ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithSize
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 2; 1;
$logoID
;
$dwidth
;
$dheight
) ]
End If
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "GMImage.NewFromContainer"; Writing data::Logo ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$image</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") = 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>120 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$destWidth</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>120 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$destHeight</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "GMImage.GetWidth"; $image ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$width</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "GMImage.GetHeight"; $image ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$height</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "GMImage.Release"; $image ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Min ( $destheight / $height; $destwidth / $width ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$factor</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$width * $factor </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$dwidth</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$height * $factor </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$dheight</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddPictureContainer"; $book;  Writing data::Logo) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$logoID</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") = 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithSize"; $book; $sheet; 2; 1; $logoID; $dwidth; $dheight) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Book.AddPictureFile
functions.description: Adds a picture to the workbook. Returns a picture identifier. Supports BMP, DIB, PNG, JPG and WMF picture formats. Use picture identifier with XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithScale or XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithSize functions. This function requires a native path. Use Path.FileMakerPathToNativePath to convert a FileMaker path to a native path if required. If you like to have the user choose the path, you can use FileDialog functions. For Server be aware that server has limited permissions and may not be able to access all files on a computer.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: FilePath
parameters.description: The native file path to the image file to include.

functions.name: XL.Book.AddSheet
functions.description: Adds a new sheet to this book, returns the sheet index. Use initSheet parameter if you wish to copy an existing sheet. Note initSheet must be only from this book.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name for the new sheet.

parameters.name: InitSheet
parameters.description: The index of an existing sheet to use as template. Must be from the same book to copy sheet.

functions.result: Returns new sheet index or error message.

functions.name: XL.Book.ConditionalFormat
functions.description: Returns a conditional format with defined index. Index must be less than return value of conditionalFormatSize property.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: The index from 0 to size-1.

parameters.description: The index for the format.

functions.name: XL.Book.DeleteSheet
functions.description: Deletes a sheet with specified index. If the sheet to delete is referenced by other sheets, this may cause problems.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet to delete. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">

    <Text>Find libXL and load it</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("XL.IsInitialized")  â‰  1</Calculation>
  </Step>

    <Script id="99999" name="InitXL"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>

  </Step>

    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.LoadBook"; "/Users/cs/Desktop/Test.xlsx")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$bookRef</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation/>

  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">

      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.SheetCount"; $bookRef )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$c</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$c >= 2</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$c > 2</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">

  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$i</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$c = $i</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.DeleteSheet"; $bookRef; 0 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.SaveToFile"; $bookRef;  "/Users/cs/Desktop/output.xlsx")</Calculation>

    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Value>
    <Repetition>

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>

functions.name: XL.Book.DeleteSheetsExcept
functions.description: Deletes all sheets except the one with given name. Returns error if sheet name is not found. On success, the book has only one sheet left. If the sheet to delete is referenced by other sheets, this may cause problems.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name of the sheet to keep.

examples.label: Delete all sheets except one:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("XL.Book.DeleteSheetsExcept";
$bookRef
; "Reiter 2")]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

functions.name: XL.Book.GetRGBMode
functions.description: Returns whether the RGB mode is active.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

functions.result: Returns 0 for index mode or 1 for RGB mode or error.

examples.label: Sets the fore color to red:
examples.text_code:
If [
MBS
( "XL.Book.GetRGBMode";
$book
) = 0 ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetPatternForegroundColor
";
$book
;
$format
; 10) ]
Else
Set Variable [
$c
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Color.Pack
";
$book
; 255; 0; 0) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetPatternForegroundColor
";
$book
;
$format
;
$c
) ]
End If
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetFillPattern
";
$book
;
$format
; 1 ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>If [ MBS( "XL.Book.GetRGBMode"; $book) = 0 ]
   Set Variable [ $r; Value: MBS( "XL.Format.SetPatternForegroundColor"; $book; $format; 10) ] 
Else
   Set Variable [ $c; Value: MBS( "XL.Color.Pack"; $book; 255; 0; 0) ]
   Set Variable [ $r; Value: MBS( "XL.Format.SetPatternForegroundColor"; $book; $format; $c) ] 
End If
Set Variable [ $r; Value: MBS( "XL.Format.SetFillPattern"; $book; $format; 1 ) ]</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Book.GetText
functions.description: Queries the text of a workbook. Numbers are formatted as floating point numbers with dot as decimal separator. Boolean values are returned as FALSE or TRUE. This function will not calculate formulas.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: Flags
parameters.description: Various flags. Whether to return formulas as text. If you pass 1 here, the formulas will be returned instead of their result. Add 2 to return rich text cells as rich text instead of plain text.

functions.name: XL.Book.InsertSheet
functions.description: Inserts a new sheet to this book at position index, returns the new sheet index. Use initSheet parameter if you wish to copy an existing sheet. Note initSheet must be only from this book.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: The index where to insert the sheet.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name for the new sheet.

parameters.name: InitSheet
parameters.description: The index of an existing sheet to use as template. Must be from the same book to copy sheet.

functions.result: Returns new sheet index or error message.

functions.name: XL.Book.SaveToFile
functions.description: Saves current workbook into xls-file. Returns error on failure or OK on result. See FileDialog functions if you like to show a save dialog to pick a destination for the file path. This function requires a native path. Use Path.FileMakerPathToNativePath to convert a FileMaker path to a native path if required. If you like to have the user choose the path, you can use FileDialog functions. For Server be aware that server has limited permissions and may not be able to access all files on a computer.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: Path
parameters.description: The native path to write the file to.

examples.label: Preprocess file before import in FileMaker by removing a row and a sheet:
examples.text_code:
# Find libXL and load it
If [
MBS
("
XL.IsInitialized
")  â‰  1 ]
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; â€śInitXLâ€ť ; Parameter:    ]
End If
#
# path to xls or xlsx file
Set Variable [
$path
; Value:
MBS
( "
Path.AddPathComponent
";
MBS
( "
Folders.UserDesktop
" ); "test.xls" ) ]
#
# Load template excel file
Set Variable [
$bookRef
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.LoadBook
";
$path
) ]
If [
MBS
("IsError") ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Error" ;
$bookRef
]
Exit Script [ Text Result:    ]
End If
#
# Remove first row of first sheet
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.RemoveRow
";
$BookRef
; 0 /* sheet index */; 0 /* row index */) ]
#
# Remove second sheet
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.DeleteSheet
";
$bookRef
; 1 /* sheet index */ ) ]
#
# Save to file and cleanup
Set Field [
XL::OutputFile
;
MBS
("XL.Book.SaveToFile";
$bookRef
;
$path
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.Release
";
$bookRef
) ]
#
# now let FileMaker import file
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Find libXL and load it</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("XL.IsInitialized")  â‰  1 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="1" name="Perform Script">
    <Calculation>  </Calculation>
    <Script id="99999" name="InitXL"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> path to xls or xlsx file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Path.AddPathComponent"; MBS( "Folders.UserDesktop" ); "test.xls" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$path</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Load template excel file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.LoadBook"; $path) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$bookRef</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$bookRef </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result:    </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Remove first row of first sheet</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.RemoveRow"; $BookRef; 0 /* sheet index */; 0 /* row index */) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Remove second sheet</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.DeleteSheet"; $bookRef; 1 /* sheet index */ ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Save to file and cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.SaveToFile"; $bookRef; $path) </Calculation>
    <Field table="XL" id="99999" name="OutputFile "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.Release"; $bookRef) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> now let FileMaker import file</Text>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Book.SetDate1904
functions.description: Sets the date system mode. Pass 1 for 1904 date system, 0 for 1900 date system (default).â€¨In the 1900 date base system, the lower limit is January 1, 1900, which has serial value 1.â€¨In the 1904 date base system, the lower limit is January 1, 1904, which has serial value 0.

functions.name: XL.Book.SheetName
functions.description: Queries the name of a sheet.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

examples.label: Query sheet names:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$names
; Value: "" ]
Set Variable [
$count
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.SheetCount
";
$bookRef
) ]
Set Variable [
$index
; Value: 0 ]
Loop [ Flush: Defer ]
Set Variable [
$names
; Value:
$names
&
MBS
( "XL.Book.SheetName";
$bookRef
;
$index
) & Â¶ ]
#
Set Variable [
$index
; Value:
$index
+ 1 ]
Exit Loop If [
$index
>=
$count
]
End Loop
Set Field [
XL::Text
;
$names
]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$names</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.SheetCount"; $bookRef) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$count</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Defer"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$names & MBS( "XL.Book.SheetName"; $bookRef; $index ) & Â¶ </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$names</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$index + 1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation> $index >= $count </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$names </Calculation>
    <Field table="XL" id="99999" name="Text "/>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Writes sheet with red font:
examples.text_code:
#create new xls file
Set Variable [
$book
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.NewBook
"; 0 )]
#create fonts
Set Variable [
$redColor
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Color.Pack";
$book
; 255; 0; 0)]
Set Variable [
$redFont
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddFont
";
$book
)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Font.SetColor
";
$book
;
$redFont
;
$redColor
)]
#
#create formats
Set Variable [
$redFormat
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddFormat
";
$book
)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetFont
";
$book
;
$redFormat
;
$redFont
)]
#
#create sheet
Set Variable [
$sheet
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddSheet
";
$book
; "Sales Receipt")]
#
#add number in red
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.CellWriteNumber
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 5; 3; 123;
$redFormat
)]
#
Set Field [
Writing data::Output
;
MBS
("
XL.Book.Save
";
$book
; "test.xls")]

$r
; Value:

("
XL.Book.Release
";
$book
)]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>create new xls file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.NewBook"; 0 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$book</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>create fonts</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Color.Pack"; $book; 255; 0; 0)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$redColor</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddFont"; $book)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$redFont</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Font.SetColor"; $book; $redFont; $redColor)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>create formats</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddFormat"; $book)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$redFormat</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Format.SetFont"; $book; $redFormat; $redFont)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>create sheet</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddSheet"; $book; "Sales Receipt")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sheet</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>add number in red</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.CellWriteNumber"; $book; $sheet; 5; 3; 123; $redFormat)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.Save"; $book; "test.xls")</Calculation>
    <Field table="Writing data" id="99999" name="Output"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.Release"; $book)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormat.Font
functions.description: Returns the font for this format. If no font is defined, the result is empty.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormatRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional format.

examples.label: Highlighting cells that begin With the given text:
examples.text_code:
# add conditional format
Set Variable [
$cFormat
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat
";
$book
) ]
#
# set font to be folder
Set Variable [
$font
; Value:
MBS
("XL.ConditionalFormat.Font";
$book
;
$cFormat
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Font.SetBold
";
$book
;
$font
; 1) ]
#
Set Variable [
$
CF
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Sheet.AddConditionalFormatting
";
$book
;
$sheet
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange
";
$book
;
$
CF
; 2; 10; 1; 1) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRule
";
$book
;
$
CF
; 0 /* BeginWith */;
$cFormat
; "a") ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> add conditional format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat"; $book) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cFormat</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> set font to be folder</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormat.Font"; $book; $cFormat) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$font</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Font.SetBold"; $book; $font; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Sheet.addConditionalFormatting"; $book; $sheet) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cf</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange"; $book; $cf; 2; 10; 1; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRule"; $book; $cf; 0 /* BeginWith */; $cFormat; "a") </Calculation>

    <Repetition>

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormat.SetBorder
functions.description: Sets the border style. Available styles: 0 None 1 Thin 2 Medium 3 Dashed 4 Dotted 5 Thick 6 Double 7 Hair 8 Medium dashed 9 Dash dot 10 Medium dash dot 11 Dash Dot Dot 12 Medium dash dot dot 13 Slant dash dot

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormatRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional format.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The border style. Default value is 1 for thin.

examples.label: Create border format:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$f
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.AddConditionalFormatting
";
$book
)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.ConditionalFormat.SetBorder";
$book
;
$f
; 1) // thin ]

    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>

</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormating.Add2ColorScaleFormulaRule
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.ConditionalFormating.Add2ColorScaleFormulaRule"; BookRef; ConditionalFormattingRef; minColor; maxColor { ; minType; minValue; maxType; maxValue; StopIfTrue } )
functions.description: Adds a conditional formatting rule that creates a gradated 2-color scale on the cells. Possible values for minType and maxType parameters:

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormattingRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional formatting.

parameters.name: minColor
parameters.description: the color for minimum

parameters.name: maxColor
parameters.description: the color for maximum

parameters.name: minType
parameters.description: the type of minValue, see values below. Defaults to 2 for CFVO_FORMULA.

parameters.name: minValue
parameters.description: The formula expression for minimum. Defaults to "".

parameters.name: maxType
parameters.description: The type of maxValue, see values below. Defaults to 2 for CFVO_FORMULA.

parameters.name: maxValue
parameters.description: The formula expression for maximum. Defaults to "".

parameters.name: StopIfTrue
parameters.description: If true, no rules with lower priority may be applied over this rule, when this rule is true. Defaults to false.

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormating.Add2ColorScaleRule
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.ConditionalFormating.Add2ColorScaleRule"; BookRef; ConditionalFormattingRef; minColor; maxColor { ; minType; minValue; maxType; maxValue; StopIfTrue } )
functions.description: Adds a conditional formatting rule that creates a gradated 2-color scale on the cells. Possible values for minType and maxType parameters:

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormattingRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional formatting.

parameters.name: minColor
parameters.description: the color for minimum

parameters.name: maxColor
parameters.description: the color for maximum

parameters.name: minType
parameters.description: the type of minValue, see values below. Defaults to 0 for CFVO_MIN.

parameters.name: minValue
parameters.description: The numeric value for minimum. Default is 0.

parameters.name: maxType
parameters.description: The type of maxValue, see values below. Defaults to 1 for CFVO_MAX.

parameters.name: maxValue
parameters.description: The numeric value for maximum. Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: StopIfTrue
parameters.description: If true, no rules with lower priority may be applied over this rule, when this rule is true. Defaults to false.

examples.label: Add conditional format to color cells based on value:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$
CF
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Sheet.AddConditionalFormatting
";
$book
;
$sheet
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange
";
$book
;
$
CF
; 3; 10; 2; 2) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("XL.ConditionalFormating.Add2ColorScaleRule";
$book
;
$
CF
;
MBS
( "
XL.Color.Pack
";
$book
; 255; 133; 40 );
MBS
( "
XL.Color.Pack
";
$book
; 255; 239; 156 )) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Sheet.addConditionalFormatting"; $book; $sheet) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cf</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange"; $book; $cf; 3; 10; 2; 2) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.Add2ColorScaleRule"; $book; $cf; MBS( "XL.Color.Pack"; $book; 255; 133; 40 ); MBS( "XL.Color.Pack"; $book; 255; 239; 156 )) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.description: Adds a conditional formatting rule that creates a gradated 3-color scale on the cells. Possible values for minType, midType and maxType parameters:

parameters.name: BookRef

parameters.name: minColor

parameters.name: maxColor
parameters.description: the color for maximum

parameters.name: minType

parameters.name: minValue
parameters.description: The formula expression for minimum. Defaults to "".

parameters.name: midType
parameters.description: the type of midValue, see values below. Defaults to 2 for CFVO_FORMULA.

parameters.name: midValue
parameters.description: The formula expression for midpoint. Defaults to "".

parameters.name: maxType
parameters.description: The type of maxValue, see values below. Defaults to 2 for CFVO_FORMULA.

parameters.name: maxValue
parameters.description: The formula expression for maximum. Defaults to "".

parameters.name: StopIfTrue
parameters.description: If true, no rules with lower priority may be applied over this rule, when this rule is true. Defaults to false.

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormating.Add3ColorScaleRule
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.ConditionalFormating.Add3ColorScaleRule"; BookRef; ConditionalFormattingRef; minColor; maxColor { ; minType; minValue; midType; midValue; maxType; maxValue; StopIfTrue } )
functions.description: Adds a conditional formatting rule that creates a gradated 3-color scale on the cells. Possible values for minType, midType and maxType parameters:

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormattingRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional formatting.

parameters.name: minColor
parameters.description: the color for minimum

parameters.name: maxColor
parameters.description: the color for maximum

parameters.name: minType
parameters.description: the type of minValue, see values below. Defaults to 0 for CFVO_MIN.

parameters.name: minValue
parameters.description: The numeric value for minimum. Default is 0.

parameters.name: midType
parameters.description: The type of midValue. Defaults to 5 for CFVO_PERCENTILE.

parameters.name: midValue

parameters.name: maxType

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormating.AddAboveAverageRule
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.ConditionalFormating.AddAboveAverageRule"; BookRef; ConditionalFormattingRef; ConditionalFormatRef { ; aboveAverage; equalAverage; stdDev; StopIfTrue } )
functions.description: Adds a conditional formatting rule that highlights cells that are above or below the average for all values in the range.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormattingRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional formatting.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormatRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional format. The conditional format used for highlighting cells, use the XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat for adding conditional formats.

parameters.name: aboveAverage
parameters.description: True for [above average] rule, false for [below average] rule. Default is true.

parameters.name: equalAverage
parameters.description: True for inclusive of the average itself, false for exclusive of that value, valid only for [above average] rule. Default is false.

parameters.name: stdDev
parameters.description: The number of standard deviations to include above or below the average, valid only for [above average] rule.

parameters.name: StopIfTrue
parameters.description: If true, no rules with lower priority may be applied over this rule, when this rule is true.

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormating.AddOpNumRule
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.ConditionalFormating.AddOpNumRule"; BookRef; ConditionalFormattingRef; Operator; ConditionalFormatRef; Value1 { ; Value2; StopIfTrue } )
functions.description: Adds a conditional formatting rule that highlights cells whose values are compared with a calculated result, using an operator.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormattingRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional formatting.

parameters.name: Operator
parameters.description: The operator in the conditional formatting rule, see the list of operators above.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormatRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional format. The conditional format used for highlighting cells, use the XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat for adding conditional formats.

parameters.name: Value1
parameters.description: The numeric value for the expression with the specified operator.

parameters.name: Value2
parameters.description: The numeric second optional value for the expression only for some operators.

parameters.name: StopIfTrue
parameters.description: If true, no rules with lower priority may be applied over this rule, when this rule is true. Default is false.

examples.label: Highlighting cells that more than the specified value:
examples.text_code:
# add conditional format
Set Variable [
$cFormat
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat
";
$book
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormat.SetFillPattern
";
$book
;
$cFormat
; 1 /* solid */) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormat.SetPatternBackgroundColor
";
$book
;
$cFormat
; 42 /* light green */) ]
#
# add conditional format to color cells based on value
Set Variable [
$
CF
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Sheet.AddConditionalFormatting
";
$book
;
$sheet
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange
";
$book
;
$
CF
; 3; 10; 2; 2) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddOpNumRule";
$book
;
$
CF
; 5 /* GreaterThan */;
$cFormat
; 90) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> add conditional format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat"; $book) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cFormat</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormat.SetFillPattern"; $book; $cFormat; 1 /* solid */) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormat.SetPatternBackgroundColor"; $book; $cFormat; 42 /* light green */) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> add conditional format to color cells based on value</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Sheet.addConditionalFormatting"; $book; $sheet) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cf</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange"; $book; $cf; 3; 10; 2; 2) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.ConditionalFormating.AddOpNumRule"; $book; $cf; 5 /* GreaterThan */; $cFormat; 90) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

parameters.description: The string value for the expression with the specified operator.

parameters.name: Value2
parameters.description: The string second optional value for the expression only for some operators.

parameters.name: StopIfTrue
parameters.description: If true, no rules with lower priority may be applied over this rule, when this rule is true. Default is false.

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.ConditionalFormating.AddRange"; BookRef; ConditionalFormattingRef; rowFirst; rowLast; ColFirst; ColLast )
functions.description: Adds a range to these conditional formatting rules.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormattingRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional formatting.

parameters.name: rowFirst
parameters.description: The first row for the area. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: rowLast
parameters.description: The last row for the area. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: ColFirst
parameters.description: The first column for the area. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: ColLast
parameters.description: The last column for the area. First column has index 0.

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormating.AddTimePeriodRule
functions.description: Adds a conditional formatting rule that highlights cells containing dates in the specified time period.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormattingRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional formatting.

parameters.name: TimePeriod
parameters.description: The applicable time period, see the list of values below.

parameters.name: StopIfTrue
parameters.description: If true, no rules with lower priority may be applied over this rule, when this rule is true. Default is false.

functions.name: XL.ConditionalFormating.AddTopRule
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.ConditionalFormating.AddTopRule"; BookRef; ConditionalFormattingRef; ConditionalFormatRef { ; Value; Bottom; Percent; StopIfTrue } )
functions.description: Adds a conditional formatting rule that highlights cells whose values fall in the [top N] or [bottom N] bracket.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormattingRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional formatting.

parameters.name: ConditionalFormatRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the conditional format. The conditional format used for highlighting cells, use the XL.Book.AddConditionalFormat for adding conditional formats.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Specifies the [top N] or [bottom N] bracket. Default is 0.

parameters.name: Bottom
parameters.description: True for a [bottom N] rule, false for a [top N] rule. Default is false.

parameters.name: Percent
parameters.description: True for a percent top/bottom rule. Default is false.

parameters.name: StopIfTrue
parameters.description: If true, no rules with lower priority may be applied over this rule, when this rule is true. Default is false.

functions.name: XL.CopyCellValue
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.CopyCellValue"; bookRef1; bookRef2; sheetIndex1; sheetIndex2; SourceRow; DestRow; SourceCol; DestCol { ; Options } )
functions.description: Copies one cell. Source and destination can be in different sheets/books. This copies most properties and all cells. If something is missing, please let us know.

parameters.name: bookRef1
parameters.description: The reference to the source workbook. Please use XL.LoadBook to load a file.

parameters.name: bookRef2
parameters.description: The reference to the destination workbook. Please use XL.LoadBook to load a file.

parameters.name: sheetIndex1
parameters.description: The source index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: sheetIndex2
parameters.description: The destination index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: SourceRow
parameters.description: The source row index.

parameters.name: DestRow
parameters.description: The destination row index.

parameters.name: SourceCol
parameters.description: The source col index.

parameters.name: DestCol
parameters.description: The destination col index.

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: Which items to skip when copying content.

examples.label: Copy a cell value:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.CopyCellValue"; $book1; $book2; $sheet1; $sheet2; 3; 4; 1; 1 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

parameters.name: bookRef1

parameters.name: sheetIndex1
parameters.description: The source index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: sheetIndex2
parameters.description: The destination index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: SourceCol
parameters.description: The source col index.

parameters.name: DestCol
parameters.description: The destination col index.

parameters.name: Options
