functions.name: XL.Sheet.CellWriteNumbers
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.CellWriteNumbers"; BookRef; SheetIndex; First row; Last row; First column; Last column; Values { ; Row Delimiter; Column Delimiter; DoBlanksForEmptyText } )
functions.description: Writes numbers to an area of cells. You can write one value or multiple values to a given range of cells. Returns number of errors occurred, so on success you get back zero.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: First row
parameters.description: The first row to process. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Last row
parameters.description: The last row to process. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: First column
parameters.description: The first column to process. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: Last column
parameters.description: The last column to process. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: The values to use. Can be separated with row and column delimiter to give each row and column a different value. But you can also use same value for all rows or for all columns.

parameters.name: Row Delimiter
parameters.description: The row delimiter for the result. Default is new line character.

parameters.name: Column Delimiter
parameters.description: The column delimiter for the result. Default is tab character.

parameters.name: DoBlanksForEmptyText
parameters.description: Whether to write blank cells. If you pass an empty value for a cell, we can either make it a text cell with empty text or mark it as an empty cell with no value.

functions.result: Returns number of errors or error.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.CellWriteStyledText
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.CellWriteStyledText"; BookRef; SheetIndex; Row; Column; Text { ; Format } )
functions.description: Writes a styled text into a cell. For alignment, please use the format parameter.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row for the cell. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column for the cell. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The new text to write.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The format for the cell. This is index from 0 to XL.GetFormatCount-1 in the book's list of formats.

  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">

functions.name: XL.Sheet.CellWriteTextAsNumber
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.CellWriteTextAsNumber"; BookRef; SheetIndex; Row; Column; Value { ; Format } )
functions.description: Writes a number into cell, but passes it as text. Avoids rounding errors with passing number as floating point value.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row for the cell. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column for the cell. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The new value to write.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The format for the cell. This is index from 0 to XL.GetFormatCount-1 in the book's list of formats.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.CellWriteTexts
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.CellWriteTexts"; BookRef; SheetIndex; First row; Last row; First column; Last column; Values { ; Row Delimiter; Column Delimiter; DoBlanksForEmptyText } )
functions.description: Writes texts to an area of cells. You can write one value or multiple values to a given range of cells. Returns number of errors occurred, so on success you get back zero.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: First row
parameters.description: The first row to process. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Last row
parameters.description: The last row to process. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: First column
parameters.description: The first column to process. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: Last column
parameters.description: The last column to process. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: The values to use. Can be separated with row and column delimiter to give each row and column a different value. But you can also use same value for all rows or for all columns.

parameters.name: Row Delimiter
parameters.description: The row delimiter for the result. Default is new line character.

parameters.name: Column Delimiter
parameters.description: The column delimiter for the result. Default is tab character.

parameters.name: DoBlanksForEmptyText
parameters.description: Whether to write blank cells. If you pass an empty value for a cell, we can either make it a text cell with empty text or mark it as an empty cell with no value.

functions.result: Returns number of errors or error.

</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Sheet.Clear
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.Clear"; BookRef; SheetIndex { ; rowFirst; rowLast; ColFirst; ColLast } )
functions.description: Clears cells in specified area.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: rowFirst
parameters.description: The first row for the area. Default is 0. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: rowLast
parameters.description: The last row for the area. Default is 65535.

parameters.name: ColFirst
parameters.description: The first column for the area. Default is 0. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: ColLast
parameters.description: The last column for the area. Default is 255.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.ClearPrintArea
functions.description: Clears the print area.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.ClearPrintRepeats
functions.description: Clears repeated rows and columns on each page.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.ColFormat
functions.description: Returns column's format. See XL.Sheet.SetColumn function o set format.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

functions.result: Returns index of new format or error.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.ConditionalFormatSize
functions.description: Returns a number of conditional formatting rules in this worksheet (only for xlsx files).

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.ConditionalFormatting
functions.description: Returns conditional formatting rules with the specified index (only for xlsx files). The index must be less than the return value of the XL.Sheet.ConditionalFormatSize function. This translates from counting up index to the indexes we use to refer to conditional formats.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: The index from 0 to size-1.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.CopyCell
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.CopyCell"; BookRef; SheetIndex; rowSource; ColumnSource; rowDest; ColumnDest )
functions.description: Copies cell with format from (rowSrc, colSrc) to (rowDst, colDst).

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: rowSource
parameters.description: The source row for the cell. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: ColumnSource
parameters.description: The source column for the cell. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: rowDest
parameters.description: The destination row for the cell.

parameters.name: ColumnDest
parameters.description: The destination column for the cell.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.DefaultRowHeight
functions.description: Returns the default row height measured in point size.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.DelHyperlink
functions.description: Removes hyperlink by index.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: The index of the hyperlink. From 0 to XL.Sheet.HyperlinkSize -1.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.DelMergeByIndex
functions.description: Removes merged cells by index.

parameters.name: BookRef

parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Index

( "XL.Sheet.DelMergeByIndex";
$bookRef
;
$sheet
; 0 ) ]
# new count is lower
Show Custom Dialog [ "Merge count" ;
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.MergeSize
";
$bookRef
; 0 ) ]
# and this is now the next one
Set Variable [
$FirstMergeRowFirst
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.Merge
";
$bookRef
;
$sheet
; 0; "RowFirst" ) ]
Set Variable [
$FirstMergeColFirst
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.Merge
";
$bookRef
;
$sheet
; 0; "ColFirst" ) ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "First merge at" ;
$FirstMergeRowFirst
& " " &
$FirstMergeColFirst
]

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">

  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Merge count" ; MBS( "XL.Sheet.MergeSize"; $bookRef</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>0 ) </Calculation>
    </Message>

      </Button>

        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>

      </Button>

  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">

      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.DelMergeByIndex"; $bookRef; $sheet; 0 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> new count is lower</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Merge count" ; MBS( "XL.Sheet.MergeSize"; $bookRef</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>0 ) </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>

      </Button>

        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> and this is now the next one</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.Merge"; $bookRef; $sheet; 0; "RowFirst" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.Merge"; $bookRef; $sheet; 0; "ColFirst" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>

functions.description: Reads all the errors from cells in an area. If one cell canâ€™t be read as error, the value in the result will be empty.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.GetCellPicture
functions.description: Queries picture for a cell. Returns picture index for the book. Use XL.Book.GetPicture function to retrieve the actual picture data. There may be multiple cells returning the same picture index here.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row for the cell. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column for the cell. First column has index 0.

examples.label: Query picture of a cell:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$sheet
; Value: 0 ]
Set Variable [
$row
; Value: 2 ]
Set Variable [
$col
; Value: 3 ]
Set Variable [
$index
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Sheet.GetCellPicture";
$bookRef
;
$sheet
;
$row
;
$col
) ]
Set Field [
XL::test
;
MBS
( "
XL.Book.GetPicture
";
$bookRef
;
$index
) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sheet</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>2 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$row</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>3 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$col</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.GetCellPicture"; $bookRef; $sheet; $row; $col) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.GetPicture"; $bookRef; $index) </Calculation>
    <Field table="XL" id="99999" name="test "/>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Sheet.GetPicture
functions.description: Returns a workbook picture index at position index in worksheet. Output parameters: (rowTop, colLeft) - top left position of picture; (rowBottom, colRight) - bottom right position of picture; width - width of picture in pixels; height - height of picture in pixels; offsetX - horizontal offset of picture in pixels; offsetY - vertical offset of picture in pixels. Use XL.Book.GetPicture for extracting binary data of picture by workbook picture index.

parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.description: Which value to return. Can be id, rowTop, colLeft, rowBottom, colRight, width, height, offsetx or offsety. "id"

functions.name: XL.Sheet.ReadCellsAsMatrix
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.ReadCellsAsMatrix"; BookRef; SheetIndex; First row; Last row; First column; Last column )
functions.description: Reads all the values from cells in an area into a new matrix. Depending on content we return number, boolean, text or timestamp. Empty, blank or error cells will return empty value. Numbers and dates are formatted by FileMaker, so they should be in localized format. Can be combined later with Matrix.CSV to get CSV text or Matrix.InsertRecords to import records into your FileMaker database.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: First row
parameters.description: The first row to process. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Last row
parameters.description: The last row to process. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: First column
parameters.description: The first column to process. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: Last column
parameters.description: The last column to process. First column has index 0.

examples.label: Read cells:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$sheet
; Value: 0 ]
# find the range we like to get
Set Variable [
$firstRow
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.GetFirstRow
";
$book
;
$sheet
) ]
Set Variable [
$lastRow
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.GetLastRow
";
$book
;
$sheet
) ]
Set Variable [
$firstCol
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.GetFirstCol
";
$book
;
$sheet
) ]
Set Variable [
$lastCol
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.GetLastCol
";
$book
;
$sheet
) ]
# read cells to a new matrix
Set Variable [
$matrix
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Sheet.ReadCellsAsMatrix";
$bookRef
;
$sheet
;
$firstRow
;
$lastRow
;
$firstCol
;
$lastCol
) ]
# and get CSV from those cells
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
MBS
( "
Matrix.CSV
";
$matrix
; 0;
MBS
( "
Matrix.Height
";
$matrix
)-1; 0;
MBS
( "
Matrix.Width
";
$matrix
)-1; Â¶; ";" ) ]
Set Field [
XL::Text
;
$text
]
# cleanup
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
Matrix.Release
";
$matrix
) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sheet</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> find the range we like to get</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.GetFirstRow"; $book; $sheet ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$firstRow</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.GetLastRow"; $book; $sheet ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$lastRow</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.GetFirstCol"; $book; $sheet ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$firstCol</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.GetLastCol"; $book; $sheet ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$lastCol</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> read cells to a new matrix</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.ReadCellsAsMatrix"; $bookRef; $sheet; $firstRow; $lastRow; $firstCol; $lastCol) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$matrix</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> and get CSV from those cells</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Matrix.CSV"; $matrix; 0; MBS( "Matrix.Height"; $matrix )-1; 0; MBS( "Matrix.Width"; $matrix )-1; Â¶; ";" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$text </Calculation>
    <Field table="XL" id="99999" name="Text "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Matrix.Release"; $matrix) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Convert Excel to CSV:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$matrix
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Sheet.ReadCellsAsMatrix";
$bookRef
;
0; // sheet index
0; // first row
9; // last row
0; // first column
5) // last column ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
Matrix.CSV
";
$matrix
) ]
examples.xml_code:

<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.ReadCellsAsMatrix";$bookRef; 0; // sheet index0; // first row9; // last row0; // first column5) // last column </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$matrix</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Matrix.CSV"; $matrix) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

( "XL.Sheet.RemoveRow";

; 0 /* sheet index */; 0 /* row index */) ]
#
# Remove second sheet
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.DeleteSheet
";
$bookRef
; 1 /* sheet index */ ) ]
#
# Save to file and cleanup
Set Field [
XL::OutputFile
;
MBS
("
XL.Book.SaveToFile
";
$bookRef
;
$path
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.Release
";
$bookRef
) ]
#
# now let FileMaker import file
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Find libXL and load it</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("XL.IsInitialized")  â‰  1 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="1" name="Perform Script">
    <Calculation>  </Calculation>
    <Script id="99999" name="InitXL"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> path to xls or xlsx file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Path.AddPathComponent"; MBS( "Folders.UserDesktop" ); "test.xls" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$path</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Load template excel file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.LoadBook"; $path) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$bookRef</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$bookRef </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result:    </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Remove first row of first sheet</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.RemoveRow"; $BookRef; 0 /* sheet index */; 0 /* row index */) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Remove second sheet</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.DeleteSheet"; $bookRef; 1 /* sheet index */ ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Save to file and cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.SaveToFile"; $bookRef; $path) </Calculation>
    <Field table="XL" id="99999" name="OutputFile "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.Release"; $bookRef) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> now let FileMaker import file</Text>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.description: Sets cell's format.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row for the cell. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column for the cell. First column has index 0.

parameters.description: The format for the cell. This is index from 0 to XL.GetFormatCount-1 in the book's list of formats.

examples.label: Apply a new format to a column:
examples.text_code:
#create new format
Set Variable [
$format
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddFormat
";
$BookRef
)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetNumFormat
";
$BookRef
;
$format
; 7)]
#set as format for column
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.SetColumn
";
$BookRef
; 0; 6; 6; 50 ;
$format
; 0 )]
#loop over all rows
Set Variable [
$lastRow
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.GetLastRow
";
$BookRef
;
$sheet
)]
Set Variable [
$row
; Value:1]
Loop
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Sheet.SetCellFormat";
$BookRef
;
$sheet
;
$row
; 6;
$format
)]
#next
Set Variable [
$row
; Value:
$row
+ 1]
Exit Loop If [
$row
>
$lastRow
]
End Loop
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>create new format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddFormat"; $BookRef )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$format</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Format.SetNumFormat"; $BookRef; $format; 7)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>set as format for column</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetColumn"; $BookRef; 0; 6; 6; 50 ; $format; 0 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>loop over all rows</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.GetLastRow"; $BookRef; $sheet )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$lastRow</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$row</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetCellFormat"; $BookRef; $sheet; $row; 6; $format )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>next</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$row + 1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$row</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$row > $lastRow</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetCellFormats
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetCellFormats"; BookRef; SheetIndex; First row; Last row; First column; Last column; Formats { ; Row Delimiter; Column Delimiter } )
functions.description: Set cell formats in given area.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: First row
parameters.description: The first row to process. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Last row
parameters.description: The last row to process. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: First column
parameters.description: The first column to process. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: Last column
parameters.description: The last column to process. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: Formats
parameters.description: The format to use. Can be separated with row and column delimiter to give each row and column a different format. But you can also use same format for all rows or for all columns.

parameters.name: Row Delimiter
parameters.description: The row delimiter for the result. Default is new line character.

parameters.name: Column Delimiter
parameters.description: The column delimiter for the result. Default is tab character.

functions.result: Returns number of errors or error.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetCol
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetCol"; BookRef; SheetIndex; ColFirst; ColLast; Width { ; Format; Hidden } )
functions.description: Sets column width and format for all columns from colFirst to colLast. If format equals 0 then format is ignored. Columns may be hidden. XL.Sheet.SetCol is the old name for XL.Sheet.SetColumn .

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: ColFirst
parameters.description: The first column.

parameters.name: ColLast
parameters.description: The last column.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: The new column width measured as the number of characters of the maximum digit width of the numbers 0, 1, 2, ..., 9 as rendered in the normal style's font. Value -1 is used for autofit column widths.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The format for the cell. This is index from 0 to XL.GetFormatCount-1 in the book's list of formats.

parameters.name: Hidden
parameters.description: Whether to hide columns.

examples.label: Create sheet with column format:
examples.text_code:
# create new xls file
Set Variable [
$book
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.NewBook
"; 1 ) ]
# load logo picture
Set Variable [
$logoID
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddPictureContainer
";
$book
;
Writing data::Logo
) ]
# create fonts
# create format for column
Set Variable [
$colFormat
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddFormat
";
$book
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetWrap
";
$book
;
$colFormat
; 1) // enable wrap ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetAlignH
";
$book
;
$colFormat
; 1) // left ]
#
# create specialized format for one cell with lock
Set Variable [
$lockFormat
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddFormat
";
$book
;
$colFormat
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Format.SetLocked
";
$book
;
$lockFormat
; 1) // on ]
#
# create sheet
Set Variable [
$sheet
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddSheet
";
$book
; "Sales Receipt") ]
# set default format for whole column
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Sheet.SetCol";
$book
;
$sheet
; 1; 1; 12;
$colFormat
) ]
#
# put some text in using column format
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.CellWriteText
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 2; 1; "Long text wraps due to column format") ]
#
# and locked format
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Sheet.CellWriteText
";
$book
;
$sheet
; 3; 1; "And this is locked";
$lockFormat
) ]
#
# save and export
Set Field [
Writing data::Output
;
MBS
("
XL.Book.Save
";
$book
; "test.xlsx") ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
XL.Book.Release
";
$book
) ]
#
Export Field Contents [
Writing data::Output
; Create folders: On ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> create new xls file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.NewBook"; 1 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$book</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> load logo picture</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddPictureContainer"; $book;  Writing data::Logo) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$logoID</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> create fonts</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> create format for column</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddFormat"; $book) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$colFormat</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Format.SetWrap"; $book; $colFormat; 1) // enable wrap </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Format.SetAlignH"; $book; $colFormat; 1) // left </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> create specialized format for one cell with lock</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddFormat"; $book; $colFormat) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$lockFormat</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Format.SetLocked"; $book; $lockFormat; 1) // on </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> create sheet</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddSheet"; $book; "Sales Receipt") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sheet</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> set default format for whole column</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetCol"; $book; $sheet; 1; 1; 12; $colFormat ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> put some text in using column format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.CellWriteText"; $book; $sheet; 2; 1; "Long text wraps due to column format") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> and locked format</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.CellWriteText"; $book; $sheet; 3; 1; "And this is locked"; $lockFormat) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> save and export</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.Save"; $book; "test.xlsx") </Calculation>
    <Field table="Writing data" id="99999" name="Output "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("XL.Book.Release"; $book) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="132" name="Export Field Contents">
    <CreateDirectories state="True"/>
    <AutoOpen state="False"/>
    <CreateEmail state="False"/>
    <Field table="Writing data" id="99999" name="Output"/>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetColHidden
functions.description: Hides or shows a column.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Col
parameters.description: The column index.

parameters.name: Hidden
parameters.description: Pass 1 to hide row or 0 to show row.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetColPx
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetColPx"; BookRef; SheetIndex; ColFirst; ColLast; Width { ; Format; Hidden } )
functions.description: Sets column width in pixels and format for all columns from colFirst to colLast. If format equals 0 then format is ignored. Columns may be hidden.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: ColFirst
parameters.description: The first column.

parameters.name: ColLast
parameters.description: The last column.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: The new column width in pixels. Value -1 is used for autofit column widths.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The format for the cell. This is index from 0 to XL.GetFormatCount-1 in the book's list of formats.

parameters.name: Hidden
parameters.description: Whether to hide columns.

examples.label: Set first column to 200 pixel:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Sheet.SetColPx";
$book
;
$sheet
; 0; 0; 200) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetColPx"; $book; $sheet; 0; 0; 200) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetColumn
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetColumn"; BookRef; SheetIndex; ColFirst; ColLast; Width { ; Format; Hidden } )
functions.description: Sets column width and format for all columns from colFirst to colLast. Column width measured as the number of characters of the maximum digit width of the numbers 0, 1, 2, ..., 9 as rendered in the normal style's font. Columns may be hidden.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: ColFirst
parameters.description: The first column. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: ColLast
parameters.description: The last column.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: The width of the column. Value -1 is used for autofit column widths.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The format index to use. You can use XL.Book.AddFormat to create new formats.

parameters.name: Hidden
parameters.description: Whether to hide column. Default is 0.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetDefaultRowHeight
functions.description: Sets the default row height measured in point size.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The new value in pixels.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetDisplayGridlines
functions.description: Sets gridlines for displaying.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The new setting. Pass 1 to have gridlines visible or 0 to hide gridlines.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetFooter
functions.description: Sets the footer text for the sheet when printed. The footer text appears at the bottom of every page when printed. The length of the text must be less than or equal to 255. The footer text can contain special commands, for example a placeholder for the page number, current date or text formatting attributes. See XL.SetHeader for details. Margin is specified in inches. See also XL.Sheet.SetPrintRepeatRows to create repeating rows on each printed page.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The new footer text.

parameters.name: Margin
parameters.description: The margin to use.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetGroupSummaryBelow
functions.description: Sets a flag of grouping rows summary. Pass 1 for below, 0 for above.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: below
parameters.description: The new setting.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetGroupSummaryRight
functions.description: Sets a flag of grouping rows summary. Pass 1 for right, false for left.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Right
parameters.description: The new setting.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetHCenter
functions.description: Sets a flag that the sheet is centered horizontally when printed.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The new setting. Pass 1 for yes, 0 for no.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetHeader
functions.description: Sets the header text of the sheet when printed. The text appears at the top of every page when printed. The length of the text must be less than or equal to 255. The header text can contain special commands, for example a placeholder for the page number, current date or text formatting attributes. Special commands are represented by single letter with a leading ampersand ("&"). Margin is specified in inches.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The new header text.

parameters.name: Margin
parameters.description: The margin to use.

examples.label: Set sheet name:

$book

    </Value>

      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetHorPageBreak
functions.description: Sets/removes a horizontal page break.

parameters.name: BookRef

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row for the cell. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Pagebreak
parameters.description: Whether to break or not. Default is 1 for a break.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetLandscape

parameters.name: Value

parameters.name: ColFirst

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithScale
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithScale"; BookRef; SheetIndex; Row; Column; pictureId; Scale { ; X; Y; Pos } )
functions.description: Sets a picture with pictureId identifier at position row and col with scale factor and offsets in pixels. Use XL.Book.AddPictureFile or XL.Book.AddPictureContainer for getting picture identifier. scale = 0 means the picture is stretched inside the specified cell or merged area.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row for the cell. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column for the cell. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: pictureId
parameters.description: The picture identifier number.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.description: The scale factor.

parameters.name: X
parameters.description: Relative offset.

parameters.name: Y
parameters.description: Relative offset.

parameters.name: Pos

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithSize
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithSize"; BookRef; SheetIndex; Row; Column; pictureId; Width; Height { ; X; Y; Pos } )
functions.description: Sets a picture with pictureId identifier at position row and col with custom size and offsets in pixels. Use XL.Book.AddPictureFile or XL.Book.AddPictureContainer for getting a picture identifier. Width and height can be -1 (or empty) for default size of picture.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row for the cell. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column for the cell. First column has index 0.

parameters.name: pictureId
parameters.description: The picture identifier number.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: The picture width to use. Can be -1 or empty for automatic size.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: The picture height to use. Can be -1 or empty for automatic size.

parameters.name: X
parameters.description: Relative offset.

parameters.name: Y
parameters.description: Relative offset.

parameters.name: Pos
parameters.description: The positioning. 0 = Move and Size, 1 = Move, 2 = Absolute.

examples.label: Adds picture with proportional scaled image:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$image
; Value:
MBS
( "
GMImage.NewFromContainer
";
Writing data::Logo
) ]
If [
MBS
("IsError") = 0 ]
Set Variable [
$destWidth
; Value: 120 ]
Set Variable [
$destHeight
; Value: 120 ]
Set Variable [
$width
; Value:
MBS
( "
GMImage.GetWidth
";
$image
) ]
Set Variable [
$height
; Value:
MBS
( "
GMImage.GetHeight
";
$image
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
GMImage.Release
";
$image
) ]
Set Variable [
$factor
; Value: Min (
$destheight
/
$height
;
$destwidth
/
$width
) ]
Set Variable [
$dwidth
; Value:
$width
*
$factor
]
Set Variable [
$dheight
; Value:
$height
*
$factor
]
#
Set Variable [
$logoID
; Value:
MBS
( "
XL.Book.AddPictureContainer
";
$book
;
Writing data::Logo
) ]
If [
MBS
("IsError") = 0 ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithSize";
$book
;
$sheet
; 2; 1;
$logoID
;
$dwidth
;
$dheight
) ]
End If
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "GMImage.NewFromContainer"; Writing data::Logo ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$image</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") = 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>120 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$destWidth</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>120 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$destHeight</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "GMImage.GetWidth"; $image ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$width</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "GMImage.GetHeight"; $image ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$height</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "GMImage.Release"; $image ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Min ( $destheight / $height; $destwidth / $width ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$factor</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$width * $factor </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$dwidth</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$height * $factor </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$dheight</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Book.AddPictureContainer"; $book;  Writing data::Logo) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$logoID</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") = 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetPictureWithSize"; $book; $sheet; 2; 1; $logoID; $dwidth; $dheight) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

parameters.name: rowLast
parameters.description: The last row for the area. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: ColFirst

parameters.name: ColLast

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetPrintFit

parameters.name: SheetIndex

parameters.name: wPages

parameters.name: hPages
parameters.description: The number of pages vertically. Default is 1.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetProtectEx
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetProtectEx"; BookRef; SheetIndex; protect; Password; ProtectEx )
functions.description: Protects/unprotects the sheet with password and enhanced parameters below. It is possible to combine a few Enhanced Protection values.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: protect
parameters.description: Whether to protect. Pass 1 to enable protection and 0 to disable.

parameters.name: Password
parameters.description: The password to use.

parameters.name: ProtectEx
parameters.description: The new protection setting. This can be a list of several options or a number.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetRightToLeft
functions.description: Sets the right-to-left mode. Pass 1 and the text is displayed in right-to-left mode,â€¨Pass 0 and the text is displayed in left-to-right mode.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: rightToLeft
parameters.description: The new value.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetRow
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetRow"; BookRef; SheetIndex; Row; Height { ; Format; Hidden } )
functions.description: Sets row height and format. Row may be hidden. Height is in points. If you want to convert from pixels to points you can use this calculation: points = pixels * 72 / 96. So for a height of 72 pixel, you pass 54 points.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row index to set. First row is zero.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: The new row height measured in point size. Zero for automatic height.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The format for the cell. This is index from 0 to XL.GetFormatCount-1 in the book's list of formats.

parameters.name: Hidden
parameters.description: Whether to hide columns.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetRowHidden
functions.description: Hides or shows a row.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row index to set.

parameters.name: Hidden
parameters.description: Pass 1 to hide row or 0 to show row.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetRowPx
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetRowPx"; BookRef; SheetIndex; Row; Height { ; Format; Hidden } )
functions.description: Sets column width in pixels and format for all columns from colFirst to colLast. If format equals 0 then format is ignored. Columns may be hidden.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row index to set. First row is zero.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: The new row height measured in pixels.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The format for the cell. This is index from 0 to XL.GetFormatCount-1 in the book's list of formats.

parameters.name: Hidden
parameters.description: Whether to hide columns.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetRows
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetRows"; BookRef; SheetIndex; Row; Last row; Height { ; Format; Hidden } )
functions.description: Sets row height and format for multiple rows. Row may be hidden. Height is in points. If you want to convert from pixels to points you can use this calculation: points = pixels * 72 / 96. So for a height of 72 pixel, you pass 54 points. XL.Sheet.SetRow is for one row, but XL.Sheet.SetRows is for a range of rows.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row index to set. First row is zero.

parameters.name: Last row
parameters.description: The last row index to set.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: The new row height measured in point size.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: The format for the cell. This is index from 0 to XL.GetFormatCount-1 in the book's list of formats.

parameters.name: Hidden
parameters.description: Whether to hide columns.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetTabColor
functions.description: Sets the color for the sheet's tab.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Red
parameters.description: The red color value. Range 0 to 255.

parameters.name: Green
parameters.description: The green color value. Range 0 to 255.

parameters.name: Blue

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetTopLeftView

parameters.name: Column

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetVCenter

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetVerPageBreak
functions.description: Sets/removes a vertical page break.

parameters.name: BookRef

parameters.name: SheetIndex

parameters.name: Column

parameters.description: Whether to break or not. Default is 1 for a break.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SetZoom
functions.description: Sets the zoom level of the current view. 100 is a usual view.

parameters.name: BookRef

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The new zoom level.

examples.label: Set first sheet to 150%:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Sheet.SetZoom";
$book
; 0; 150 ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.SetZoom"; $book; 0; 150 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Sheet.Split
functions.description: Splits a sheet at position (row, col).

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Row
parameters.description: The row for the cell. First row has index 0.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column for the cell. First column has index 0.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.SplitInfo
functions.description: Gets the split information (position of frozen pane) in the sheet.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Selector
parameters.description: Which value to query. Can be row or col.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.Table
functions.description: Gets the table parameters by index.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: The index of the table to query.

parameters.name: Selector
parameters.description: Which value to query. Can be rowFirst, rowLast, colFirst, colLast, headerRowCount (the number of header rows showing at the top of the table. 0 means that the header row is not shown), totalsRowCount (the number of totals rows that shall be shown at the bottom of the table. 0 means that the totals row is not shown) or name.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.TableSize
functions.description: Returns the number of tables in the sheet.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

functions.name: XL.Sheet.Type
functions.description: Returns type of sheet with specified index. Type is Sheet, Chart or Unknown.

parameters.name: BookRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

examples.label: Query type of first sheet:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$type
; Value:
MBS
( "XL.Sheet.Type";
$book
; 0 ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "XL.Sheet.Type"; $book; 0 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$type</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: XL.Table.SetColumnName
functions.signature: MBS( "XL.Table.SetColumnName"; BookRef; SheetIndex; TableIndex; columnIndex; Value )
functions.description: Sets the unique name of the table column with the specified index. Please note that if you write the name of the column with the XL.Sheet.CellWriteText function, the workbook will be corrupted, because the XL.Sheet.CellWriteText function doesn't check if the specified cell belongs to a table.

parameters.description: The reference number for the workbook.

parameters.name: SheetIndex
parameters.description: The index of the sheet. This number ranges from 0 to XL.Book.SheetCount -1.

parameters.name: TableIndex
parameters.description: The name of the table or the zero based index.

parameters.name: columnIndex
parameters.description: The zero based column index.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The new name.

functions.name: XL.Uninitialize
functions.description: Uninitializes XL library. This will clear all XLBook objects, clear all function pointers and free the library. You only need to call this if you like to replace the Library file and load another version. The library is automatically unloaded when FileMaker quits.
